ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "income" REAL /* Monthly income of the customer in USD */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer's residential or business address */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer registered */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login to the app */,
  "total_trips" INTEGER /* Total number of trips taken by the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Points earned by the customer for frequent use */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the transaction */,
  "payment_mode" TEXT /* Payment mode used for the transaction (e.g., Card, Cash) */,
  "date_of_travel" TEXT /* Date of travel for the transaction */,
  "company" TEXT /* Company that provided the ride-hailing or taxi service */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the transaction took place */,
  "km_travelled" REAL /* Distance traveled in kilometers */,
  "price_charged" REAL /* Price charged to the customer */,
  "cost_of_trip" REAL /* Cost of the trip */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., Paid, Pending, Failed) */,
  "coupon_code" TEXT /* Coupon code used for the transaction */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Amount of discount applied */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount charged */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount paid by the customer */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver who provided the service */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer to the driver (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_company FOREIGN KEY ("company") REFERENCES companies ("company_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_city FOREIGN KEY ("city") REFERENCES cities ("city_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_payment_mode FOREIGN KEY ("payment_mode") REFERENCES payment_modes ("payment_mode_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the company operates */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the company */,
  "establishment_date" TEXT /* Date when the company was established */,
  "fleet_size" INTEGER /* Number of vehicles in the company's fleet */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the company based on customer feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the city in square kilometers */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the city */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_modes" (
  "payment_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment mode */,
  "payment_mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment mode (e.g., Card, Cash) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment mode */,
  "is_contactless" INTEGER /* Indicates if the payment mode is contactless */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_details" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction that the trip belongs to */,
  "km_travelled" REAL /* Distance traveled in kilometers */,
  "price_charged" REAL /* Price charged to the customer */,
  "cost_of_trip" REAL /* Cost of the trip */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trip */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trip */,
  "start_location" TEXT /* Starting location of the trip */,
  "end_location" TEXT /* Ending location of the trip */,
  "estimated_time" INTEGER /* Estimated time for the trip in minutes */,
  "actual_time" INTEGER /* Actual time taken for the trip in minutes */,
  "route" TEXT /* Route taken for the trip */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_details_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revenue" (
  "revenue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revenue entry */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction that the revenue belongs to */,
  "price_charged" REAL /* Price charged to the customer */,
  "cost_of_trip" REAL /* Cost of the trip */,
  "net_profit" REAL /* Net profit generated by the company */,
  "profit_per_km" REAL /* Profit per kilometer */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Amount refunded to the customer */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission earned by the company */,
  "driver_earnings" REAL /* Earnings of the driver */,
  "company_earnings" REAL /* Earnings of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revenue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revenue_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer support, marketing, financial) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access device */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
